footer.poweredBy: © {year} PlayDex | Powered by IGDB and Steamworks

legal.aboutIntro: Welcome to PlayDex! This page presents our mission, our team, and our passion for video games. We are committed to providing a reliable and enriching community platform for all gamers.
legal.missionText: PlayDex aims to bring gamers together around a shared passion, make it easier to discover new games, and encourage the exchange of ideas and experiences. We believe in the power of community to create a positive and stimulating environment.
legal.teamText: Our team is made up of video game enthusiasts, developers, and active community members. We work every day to improve the platform and meet the needs of our users.
legal.contactText: For any questions, suggestions, or partnerships, feel free to contact us through the contact form or on our social media.
legal.privacyIntro: Your privacy matters to us. We are committed to protecting your personal data and respecting the confidentiality of your information in accordance with applicable law.
legal.dataCollectionText: We only collect information necessary for the proper functioning of the platform, such as your email address, username, and game preferences. This data is never sold to third parties.
legal.dataUsageText: Your data is used to personalize your experience, improve our services, and ensure community safety. You can request the deletion or modification of your personal information at any time.
legal.securityText: We implement advanced security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access. For any privacy questions, contact us.
legal.privacyMore: For more details, please refer to our complete privacy policy or contact us with any questions.
legal.termsIntro: By using PlayDex, you agree to abide by our terms of use. We encourage you to read these terms carefully to understand your rights and responsibilities on the platform.
legal.platformUsageText: You agree to use PlayDex in compliance with applicable laws and with respect for other community members. Any abusive, fraudulent, or unethical use may result in account suspension.
legal.userContentText: You are responsible for the content you publish on the platform. We reserve the right to remove any content deemed inappropriate or contrary to our values.
legal.termsChangeText: The terms of use may be modified at any time. We will inform you of any significant changes. By continuing to use the platform, you accept the new terms.
legal.termsMore: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us.
legal.guidelinesIntro: To ensure a healthy and respectful environment, we invite you to follow our community guidelines. Respect, kindness, and mutual aid are essential on PlayDex.
legal.respectText: Every member must show respect for others, avoid hateful, discriminatory, or offensive speech, and encourage a climate of mutual aid.
legal.forbiddenContentText: Violent, illegal, discriminatory, or sexual content is strictly prohibited. Any violation may result in immediate sanctions.
legal.reportingText: If you witness inappropriate behavior, use the reporting feature to let us know. We will handle each report with seriousness and confidentiality.
legal.guidelinesClosing: Thank you for contributing to a positive and inclusive community!

meta.title: PlayDex - Never miss a patch again!
meta.description: PlayDex lets you track updates for your favorite games. Stay informed about the latest patch notes, DLCs, and extensions.
meta.ogTitle: PlayDex - Never miss a patch again!
meta.ogDescription: Track updates for your favorite games with PlayDex

cookie.message: This site uses cookies and local storage for authentication and site functionality.
